---
title: "Notes · Thoughts · Blog"
subtitle:
  This blog serves as my personal repository of various topics related to statistics, 
  R programming and visualizations. 
  It's my way of transforming gained knowledge into well-structured and accessible notes.<br>
  <br>
  A list of some useful resources I collected can be found here   [LINK](https://serigra.github.io/Resources/).
css: styles_blog.css
listing: 
  contents: 
    - "**/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 4
  #page-size: 8 # show max 8 posts per page
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, description, categories, date, image]
  image-height: "220"

comments: false
title-block-banner: false
---
